hero.headline: *Transform Your Tampa Property* Into a Stunning Outdoor Paradise
hero.subheadline: Professional landscaping services that boost your curb appeal and property value with Florida-friendly designs that thrive year-round in our climate.

services_section.label: OUR SERVICES
services_section.heading: Complete Landscaping Solutions
services_section.subheading: From design to installation to maintenance, we handle every aspect of your outdoor transformation

services.title: 🌴 Landscape Design & Installation
services.description: Custom landscape designs featuring Florida-friendly plants, palm trees, and tropical gardens that complement Tampa Bay's coastal climate and reduce water usage.

services.title: 🌱 Lawn Care & Maintenance
services.description: Weekly mowing, edging, fertilization, and weed control to keep your St. Augustine or Bermuda grass looking pristine in Florida's challenging growing conditions.

services.title: 🌺 Flower Bed Design
services.description: Colorful annual and perennial plantings with mulching and seasonal updates to create stunning focal points that bloom beautifully in Tampa's subtropical climate.

services.title: 💧 Irrigation Systems
services.description: Efficient sprinkler system installation and repair to ensure proper watering while conserving water and complying with local restrictions.

services.title: 🌿 Hardscape Installation
services.description: Patios, walkways, retaining walls, and outdoor living spaces using materials that withstand Florida's heat, humidity, and occasional storms.

about.heading: Your Tampa Bay Landscaping Specialists
about.body: Based right here in Tampa, we understand the unique challenges of Florida landscaping - from sandy soils to hurricane-force winds to water restrictions. Our team specializes in creating beautiful, sustainable outdoor spaces that thrive in our subtropical climate while adding lasting value to your property.

reviews.name: Maria G.
reviews.text: They completely redesigned our front yard with gorgeous native plants and a new irrigation system. The crew finished in just 3 days and it looks amazing even after this summer's heat wave.

reviews.name: James R.
reviews.text: Been using them for monthly lawn service for over a year. My St. Augustine grass has never looked better and they always show up on schedule, even during rainy season.

reviews.name: Linda C.
reviews.text: Installed a beautiful flower bed with colorful plants that actually survive Florida summers. Great communication throughout the project and stayed within budget.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Tampa Bay Communities
service_areas.subheading: Professional landscaping services throughout the greater Tampa area

cta.heading: Ready to Transform Your Outdoor Space?
cta.body: Get a free estimate for your landscaping project. We'll visit your property and provide detailed recommendations tailored to Tampa's climate.
